---
title: "Ideas & Experiments"
---

This section gathers applied projects, tools, and experiments at the intersection of data science, development economics, and public policy. The work here is exploratory — combining satellite imagery, geospatial data, and statistical methods to address concrete policy problems in developing country contexts.

---

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:1.5rem; margin-top:1.5rem;">

  <a href="togo-targeting.html" style="text-decoration:none; color:inherit; flex:1; min-width:280px;">
    <div style="border:1px solid #dde3f0; border-radius:10px; padding:1.5rem 1.8rem; transition:box-shadow 0.2s; background:#fff;" onmouseover="this.style.boxShadow='0 4px 18px rgba(0,35,102,0.12)'" onmouseout="this.style.boxShadow='none'">
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.7rem; margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
        <span style="background:#002366; color:white; border-radius:6px; padding:0.3rem 0.7rem; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.04em;">SPATIAL ANALYSIS</span>
        <span style="color:#888; font-size:0.82rem;">Togo · 2024</span>
      </div>
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 0.6rem 0; font-size:1.08rem; font-weight:700; color:#002366; line-height:1.35;">
        Development of Spatial Targeting Tools for Togo
      </h3>
      <p style="margin:0; color:#444; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.6;">
        A data-driven composite priority index combining census, satellite, and geospatial layers to rank cantons and neighborhoods by vulnerability — supporting the allocation of social and infrastructure investments.
      </p>
      <div style="margin-top:1rem; color:#002366; font-size:0.88rem; font-weight:600;">Read more →</div>
    </div>
  </a>

</div>
```
